name: akvalink-app
description: AkvaLink native app (Capacitor) — reuses the web/ UI with native BLE on iOS/Android.

scripts.add:ios: cap add ios && npm run ios:permissions && npm run ios:icon
scripts.add:android: cap add android && npm run android:icon
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build && cap sync ios && npm run ios:permissions && npm run ios:icon && cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run build && cap sync android && npm run android:icon && cap open android
